title: Symphyogyne rupicola
taxonomy: Symphyogyne rupicola is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. It belongs to the genus Symphyogyno, which is a genus of flowering plants native to Southeast Asia. The species Symphyogyne rupicola is a type of epiphytic plant, meaning it grows on other plants or structures. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia, specifically in countries such as Malaysia and Indonesia. Within the Gesneriaceae family, Symphyogyne rupicola is classified as a member of the tribe Didymocarpoideae.
